steps.t: Cyneswyth can be found outside of her home in western Edoras. You should ask Cyneswith about her missing daughter.
The neighbours can be found next to Cyneswith home in western Edoras. You should ask the neighbours if they have any knowledge of Saburg's whereabouts…
Saburg's neighbour mentioned that Saburg often returned home with scrapes, covered in dirt and brambles. You should check the rocky outcroppings outsi…
Saburg can be found amongst the rocks just outside the south-east corner of Edoras. You should urge Saburg to hurry home to her mother.
